sections.paragraph:
-(I) i.q. שָׁנַן to be sharp, to prick; hence צִנָּה, צְנִינִים a thorn, thorns.

(II) i.q. גָּנַן to protect (as to the connection of the letters ג and צ, see last remark under letter , p. 698, A ); whence צִנָּה No. II, a shield [“also צִנְצֶנֶת”].

(III) from the Chaldee usage, i.q. צָלַל No. 3 (l and n being interchanged), to be cold; whence צִנָּה No. III.
